titleStmt.title: SII 34.83: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 83. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record says that Vīrasēkara-vēḷāṉ, a madhyastha of the brahmadēya village Ālaṅguḍi in Muḍichōṇāḍu in Suttamali-vaḷanāḍu, made a gift of money amounting 350 current good kāsu for a lamp and midnight offerings and for betel leaves, areca-nuts, a knife and a scissors or nut-cracker (kattirigai) in the temple of Tirukkāṟkōtīśvaram. The Śivabrāhmaṇas who took charge of the gift promised that the services would not be disrupted even if they sell or mortgage their right of conducting worship.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvanacakkaravattikaḷ maturaikoṇṭaruḷiy śrī kulOttuṅkacOḻa tEvaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu vaṭakarai vikkamacOḻavaḷanāṭṭu viṟaikkūṟṟattu śrīkāmatavalliccaruppEti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tirukkāṟkOṭīśvavaramuṭaiya nāyanār kOyilil muppatu vaṭṭattuk kāṇiuṭaiya civappirāmaṇar
muṟṟum cuttamalivaḷa nāṭṭu muṭiccōṇāṭṭup piramma tēyam Ālaṅkuṭiyāṉa śrī O petimaṅkalattu madhyastaṉ Ālaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Ūruṭaipperumāḷ Ampalaṅkōyil koṇṭāṉāṉa vīracēkara vēḷāṉ pakkal Innāyaṉār keṟpakkiraka tirumuṉpu Ivvāṭṭai mīṉa nāyaṟu mutal pacuvin
naṟu neyyāl tiri nuntāviḷakkoṉṟēṟṟavum Akal Oṉṟum Uttama tīpattukku vēṇṭum nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa Anṟāṭu naṟkācu Irunūṟṟaimpatu Innāyanāṟku tiruvarttayāmattukku Uṭaiyāṟkum tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai nācciyāṟkum tiruantappuraccēmaccuruḷāka Amutu ceytaruḷa nāḷ Oṉṟukku
Aṭaikāyamutu pākku Irupattu nālum Ilai Amutu paṟṟu Araiyē Iraṇṭumāvum parikka kiḷikkatti Oṉṟum naṟukka kattirikai Oṉṟum nāṅkaḷ nā Orupātiyāka koṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu nūṟum Āka Ikkācu muṉṉūṟṟaimpatim Ittaṉmaṅkaḷukku Upaiyamāka I
kkācil policai koṇṭu yāvaṟ jīvitam cantirātittavaṟ celuttakkaṭavōmāka sammatittu Upaiyaṅkoṇ
ṭōm Ikkōyiṟkāṇi Uṭaiya civappirāmaṇarōm Iccivappirāmaṇakkāṇi Innāḷ mutal vilaiyum
Oṟṟiyum Ivvupaiyañ ceppikkoṭucelutta Icaintu Upaiyaṅkoṇṭōm muppatu vaṭṭattukāṇi
Uṭai civappirāmaṇarōm
Digital edition of SII 34.83 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
